seo.title: EZ Mart
seo.description: Premium e-commerce platform offering beauty, electronics, fashion, and furniture.

faq.question: What is EZ Mart?
faq.answer: EZ Mart is an easy e-commerce platform that delivers everyday items including beauty, fashion, furniture, and electronics with fast shipping.

faq.question: How long does shipping take?
faq.answer: Shipping typically takes 2-5 business days depending on your locality. Orders are fully tracked and insured.

faq.question: What is the return policy?
faq.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all products in their original condition and packaging.

faq.question: How do I track my order?
faq.answer: You can view your order status and tracking details under the 'Order History' page in your account dashboard.

faq.question: Are payments on EZ Mart secure?
faq.answer: Yes, all transactions are processed using encrypted, SSL-secured checkouts to ensure the highest standards of safety for your payment data.

faq.question: Can I cancel or modify my order?
faq.answer: Orders can be canceled or modified within 1 hour of placement. Once processed or shipped, they fall under our standard returns policy.

faq.question: Does EZ Mart offer international shipping?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer global shipping. International delivery rates and shipping windows are computed at checkout based on destination.

faq.question: How can I contact customer support?
faq.answer: You can reach us by email at contact@ezmart.in or call our support line at +91-000-111-999 (9:00 AM - 6:00 PM IST).
